issues.title: ResumeUpload missing organization scope
issues.attack: Independent uploads (project=null) have no org FK, risking multi-tenant data exposure
issues.response: Will add organization FK to ResumeUpload, derive from project/user at creation

issues.title: Models don't specify BaseModel inheritance
issues.attack: Spec lists UUID/timestamp fields manually instead of inheriting BaseModel
issues.response: Both models must inherit BaseModel per project conventions

issues.title: Synchronous extraction in POST with polling contradiction
issues.attack: POST implies sync extraction but also has polling; no Celery means this blocks HTTP
issues.response: POST creates pending records only; processing via management command or separate trigger view

issues.title: File format support contradicts existing pipeline
issues.attack: Spec says pdfplumber when code uses PyMuPDF; says DOCX is new but it already exists
issues.response: Fix spec to reference existing text.py with PyMuPDF/python-docx; only HWP is new

issues.title: HWP dependencies not in pyproject.toml
issues.attack: Neither pyhwp nor olefile is installed; deployment will fail
issues.response: Must add concrete dependency or defer HWP; recommend olefile or explicit deferral

issues.title: Gmail credential encryption unspecified
issues.attack: Says encrypted but no mechanism, key management, or rotation
issues.response: Specify Fernet encryption with SECRET_KEY-derived key or django-encrypted-model-fields

issues.title: OAuth refresh token handling incomplete
issues.attack: No access_type=offline, no refresh logic, tokens will expire
issues.response: Add offline access, consent prompt, refresh logic, reconnect flow

issues.title: Gmail dedup insufficient for multi-attachment messages
issues.attack: email_message_id alone can't distinguish multiple attachments from one email
issues.response: Add email_attachment_id, unique constraint on (message_id, attachment_id, org)

issues.title: Candidate linking not atomic
issues.attack: Concurrent uploads of same person can create duplicate candidates
issues.response: Use transaction.atomic() + select_for_update() following existing save.py pattern

issues.title: Identity matching lacks normalization details
issues.attack: No normalization rules for email/phone matching
issues.response: Existing candidate_identity.py already handles normalization; spec reuses it

issues.title: Project matching by keyword unsafe for multi-tenant
issues.attack: Keyword matching can link resume to wrong org's project
issues.response: Scope to user's org, use UUID for REF, require manual confirm for keyword matches

issues.title: File validation missing
issues.attack: No size limits, MIME checks, or parser timeouts
issues.response: Add 20MB max, MIME validation, extension consistency check, parser timeout

issues.title: Gmail attachment download lacks size/error handling
issues.attack: Oversized attachments and API errors can break cron run
issues.response: Per-attachment size cap, retry with backoff, skip with logging, never abort batch

issues.title: history_id expiration handling underspecified
issues.attack: Gmail history IDs expire; polling can fail permanently
issues.response: Fallback to messages.list with after:last_checked_at filter when history is invalid

issues.title: EmailMonitorConfig not scoped to organization
issues.attack: User's config may process resumes into wrong tenant
issues.response: User belongs to exactly one org via Membership OneToOne; org derivable from user

issues.title: extraction_result JSONField for relational data
issues.attack: Review/linking decisions stored in JSON breaks integrity
issues.response: extraction_result is opaque pipeline output snapshot; relational data uses FK fields

issues.title: No spec for adding candidate to project searching list
issues.attack: Candidate created but never appears in project workflow
issues.response: Must define Contact record creation to place candidate in project search results

issues.title: URL authorization and tenant scoping absent
issues.attack: UUID guessing can expose cross-org data
issues.response: Every view must filter by organization/project membership/ownership

issues.title: State transitions not constrained
issues.attack: Failed/discarded records could be re-linked or reprocessed
issues.response: Define allowed transitions and enforce in service layer under transactions

issues.title: Polling endpoint underspecified
issues.attack: May return all uploads, leaking other users' data
issues.response: Scope to current user's recent uploads for this project with optional batch_id

issues.title: Failure/retry behavior not designed
issues.attack: No retry endpoint, limit, error storage, or failure categorization
issues.response: Add error_message, retry_count (max=3), last_attempted_at, retry URL

issues.title: Spec doesn't reference run_extraction_with_retry
issues.attack: New implementation may bypass existing integrity pipeline
issues.response: Explicitly reference run_extraction_with_retry with use_integrity_pipeline=True

issues.title: Telegram notification as hard dependency
issues.attack: Notification failure can break email processing
issues.response: Make best-effort, non-blocking; skip if no TelegramBinding, log failures

issues.title: file_type choices missing DOC
issues.attack: Existing DOC support may be excluded
issues.response: Add doc to file_type choices since text.py already supports it

issues.title: FK on_delete behavior unspecified
issues.attack: Cascade may erase resume processing history
issues.response: Specify SET_NULL for project, candidate, created_by FKs

issues.title: Gmail cron concurrency not addressed
issues.attack: Overlapping cron runs can create duplicate uploads
issues.response: Add select_for_update() on EmailMonitorConfig at cron run start

issues.title: OAuth URLs are global not tenant-aware
issues.attack: Unclear which org's monitoring is configured in multi-org UI
issues.response: OAuth is per-user OneToOne; org implicit via session auth; matches existing URL patterns

issues.title: Retention/privacy policy for uploaded files
issues.attack: Sensitive resume data may persist after discard/disconnect
issues.response: Define: discard deletes file, disconnect preserves imports, failed auto-delete after 30d

issues.title: Identity matching not org-scoped
issues.attack: identify_candidate() queries globally without org filter, causing cross-tenant leakage
issues.response: Add org-aware wrapper or extend identify_candidate() to accept organization parameter

issues.title: New candidates created without owned_by
issues.attack: _create_candidate() in save.py doesn't set owned_by, making candidates invisible in org-scoped search
issues.response: Set candidate.owned_by = upload.organization after creation in linker

issues.title: Existing-candidate link bypasses resume version persistence
issues.attack: Calling _update_candidate() directly skips Resume creation, ExtractionLog, etc.
issues.response: Use save_pipeline_result() for both paths instead of calling private _update_candidate()

issues.title: Contact alone doesn't place candidate in search tab
issues.attack: project_tab_search() builds results from match_candidates() only, not from contacts
issues.response: Add uploaded resumes section to search tab view or modify view to include uploads

issues.title: project=null email uploads have no management UI
issues.attack: Email resumes without REF match become orphaned with no view/assign capability
issues.response: Add org-scoped unassigned resumes inbox with project assignment flow

issues.title: Duplicate status transition ordering underspecified
issues.attack: extracting→duplicate is not in allowed transitions; needs extracting→extracted→duplicate
issues.response: Make two-step explicit: extracting→extracted, then extracted→duplicate if match found

issues.title: Email dedup pre-insert check is race-prone
issues.attack: .exists() check before insert is TOCTOU vulnerable
issues.response: Use get_or_create() or catch IntegrityError; DB constraint is source of truth

issues.title: Crypto uses SHA-256 but spec says HKDF
issues.attack: Plan implements SHA-256+base64 but design spec says HKDF; migration pain if changed later
issues.response: Use HKDF from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.kdf.hkdf with stable salt/info

issues.title: Gmail error-handling not detailed in plan
issues.attack: Design spec's error table (401/404/429/5xx/oversized/timeout) not reflected in plan
issues.response: Add explicit error handling code paths for each case in gmail_client.py steps

issues.title: Test coverage misses project-specific failure modes
issues.attack: No tests for cross-org collision, owned_by, unassigned inbox, search visibility, dedup race
issues.response: Add specific tests for all identified failure modes
